preamble: The voiceless aspirated alveolar affricate [tsʰ] undergoes deaspiration to [ts], a common process in both Sinitic and Indic language families.

examples.note: Loss of aspiration in certain NIA (New Indo-Aryan) dialects.

sources: Ladefoged, P., & Maddieson, I. (1996). The Sounds of the World's Languages.
